name: zeus-cod-bo6-bot-manager

metadata.name: zeus-cod-bo6-bot-manager
metadata.summary: A admin panel for controlling gamepad inputs and managing HWIDs.

documentation:
# Zeus Bot Lobby Manager - Admin Panel

Admin panel for Zeus Server Script. This is a web application that allows you to manage your Zeus Bot lobbies.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.find_free_port
documentation: Find an available port on the system.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.update_backend_url
documentation: Update the backendUrl in frontend's appConfig.json.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.start_backend
documentation: Start the Flask backend server.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.start_frontend
documentation: Start the Vue.js frontend server.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.cleanup
documentation: Clean up processes and resources on script exit.

variables.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.main.ALLOWED_USER_AGENT
documentation: Restrict to PySide6

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.handlers.misc_handlers.copy_to_clipboard
documentation: Copy the provided text to the clipboard.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.database.init_db
documentation: Initialize the SQLite database.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.database.get_db_connection
documentation: Get a connection to the SQLite database.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.handlers.servers_handler.add_servers
documentation: Handler for /addServers endpoint.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.handlers.servers_handler.check_server_health
documentation: Check if a list of servers is reachable and return their health status.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.handlers.servers_handler.send_commands_to_target_vm
documentation:
Send commands to specified servers or all servers if no specific server is provided.

Request Payload:
{
    "servers": ["serverIp1", "serverIp2"],  # Optional. If not provided, all servers are targeted.
    "keyCode": "press_a"  # Required. The command to send.
}

Returns:
    JSON response indicating success or failure for each server.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.handlers.servers_handler.fetch_logs_from_servers
zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.response_helper.create_response
documentation:
Create a standardized JSON response.

Args:
    response_type (ResponseType): Enum indicating success or error.
    message (str): Message to include in the response.
    data (dict, optional): Additional data to include in the response.
    status_code (int): HTTP status code for the response.

Returns:
    Response: Flask JSON response object with status code.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.server_utils.call_server
documentation:
Connect to a server, authenticate using HWID, and send a command.

Args:
    server_ip (str): The IP address of the server.
    server_port (int): The port on which the server is listening.
    command (str): The command to send to the server.
    timeout (int): Connection timeout in seconds.

Returns:
    str: The response from the server.

Raises:
    ServerCommunicationError: If communication with the server fails or times out.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.server_utils.verify_server_health
documentation:
Verify the health of a server by sending a health check command with HWID authentication.

Args:
    server_ip (str): The server IP to check.
    server_port (int): The server port to check.

Returns:
    tuple: (status, reason) - status can be "healthy" or "unhealthy", reason provides additional info.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.server_utils.check_all_servers_health
documentation:
Check the health of multiple servers in parallel.

Args:
    servers_to_check (set): Set of server IPs to check.

Returns:
    list: A list of server statuses with reasons.

classes.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.server_utils.ServerCommunicationError
documentation: Custom exception for server communication errors.

functions.name: zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.misc_utils.open_url_browser
zeus_cod_bo6_bot_manager.backend.utils.misc_utils.get_device_hwid
documentation: Generate a unique and persistent device HWID.
